# `polars selector numeric` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all numeric columns.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector numeric {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all numeric columns
```nu
> {
        "foo": ["x", "y"],
        "bar": [123, 456],
        "baz": [2.0, 5.5],
        "zap": [0, 0],
    } |
    polars into-df --as-columns |
    polars select (polars selector numeric) |
    polars sort-by bar baz zap |
    polars collect
╭───┬─────┬──────┬─────╮
│ # │ bar │ baz  │ zap │
├───┼─────┼──────┼─────┤
│ 0 │ 123 │ 2.00 │   0 │
│ 1 │ 456 │ 5.50 │   0 │
╰───┴─────┴──────┴─────╯

```
